creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since py-qtconsole is only required by devel/py-spyder (py36 qt5) I agree to switch devel/py-qtconsole to qt5 (and py36 too ?).

Sorry to reopen this issue, I have build (and run jupyter-qtconsole / import qtconsole ) it on 11.1 with latest pkg.

I'll look into it in depth.
